issues.title: [AI ECOSYSTEM][EPIC] Build Quân Sư as the local AI gateway and advisor
match_titles: [EPIC] Define four-repository ecosystem architecture and ownership
issues.body:
## Outcome

Transform `chat-assistant` into the transport-neutral Quân Sư service: normal advisor chat plus orchestration of language, game, and health assistants.

## Scope

- Five-repository AI ecosystem: `my-discord-bot`, `chat-assistant`, `lang-assistant`, `game-assistant`, and `health-assistant`.
- `red-cogs` remains a separately operated music subsystem coordinated only at the server level.
- No Discord token or Discord gateway in this repository after migration.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] All child issues cover requirements, architecture, implementation, contracts, security, test, QA, deployment, release, and maintenance.
- [ ] Generic advisor chat is separated from specialist capabilities.
- [ ] The single-owner MVP and future multi-user boundary are explicit.

## Definition of done

Quân Sư can serve Mama Tổng Quản through a private local API and route approved work without owning specialist domain data.

issues.title: [ADR] Select local HTTP/JSON transport and staged deployment topology
match_titles: [ADR] Choose integration transport and deployment topology
issues.body:
## Outcome

Approve local HTTP/JSON as the MVP transport from `my-discord-bot` to `chat-assistant`, with Python public-service adapters for specialist assistants and a migration path to isolated local services.

## Scope

- Loopback binding for native deployment and private networking for containers.
- Process ownership, startup, health, restart, timeout, cancellation, and version negotiation.
- Local authentication and trust boundary.
- Windows and Linux support.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] No service requires public Internet exposure.
- [ ] The bot reaches one stable gateway endpoint.
- [ ] Assistant adapters can later move out of process without changing the consumer protocol.
- [ ] Rejected alternatives and trade-offs are recorded.

issues.title: [CONTRACT] Define the versioned assistant capability protocol
issues.body:
## Outcome

Define a transport-neutral protocol for generic advisor chat and all specialist operations.

## Scope

- Schema version, request/correlation ID, caller context, capability, operation, structured input, deadline, attachments, progress, cancellation, result, and stable error.
- Backward compatibility, unknown fields, deprecation, and fixture ownership.

## Dependencies

- CA-AI-002

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Protocol models contain no Discord or database types.
- [ ] Stable errors cover unauthorized, invalid input, unsupported capability, busy, unavailable, timeout, cancellation, incompatible version, safety refusal, and internal failure.
- [ ] Machine-checkable fixtures exist for generic, language, game, and health capabilities.
- [ ] Secrets and raw stack traces cannot appear in envelopes.

issues.title: [SECURITY] Define owner identity, authorization, privacy, and data ownership
match_titles: [SECURITY] Define identity, authorization, privacy, and data ownership
issues.body:
## Outcome

Define the single-owner trust model and privacy rules across all five AI repositories.

## Scope

- Minimized caller context from Mama Tổng Quản.
- Per-capability authorization and future multi-user migration.
- Raw content logging, retention, export, deletion, temporary attachments, and audit metadata.
- Health-specific fail-closed restrictions.

## Dependencies

- CA-AI-002
- CA-AI-003

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Missing or invalid identity fails closed.
- [ ] Admin status is not a shortcut to private learner, player, or health records.
- [ ] Each stored datum has one owner and retention rule.
- [ ] Raw prompts/responses are not persisted unless explicitly approved.
- [ ] Health data receives stricter logging and retention defaults.

issues.title: [REFACTOR] Remove the legacy Discord runtime and initialize the gateway package
match_titles: [TASK] Initialize Python project and package layout
issues.body:
## Outcome

Replace the legacy one-file Discord bot with a package-based local gateway service.

## Scope

- Remove Discord token, client, command registration, message-content intent, and Discord memory/rate-limit ownership.
- Separate protocol, application services, HTTP adapter, generic advisor, provider adapters, specialist adapters, config, observability, and composition root.
- Preserve useful prompt behavior only behind reviewed generic-chat contracts.

## Dependencies

- CA-AI-002

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] No production dependency on `discord.py` remains.
- [ ] Importing the package has no network or configuration side effects.
- [ ] The service starts and stops cleanly with a minimal health endpoint.
- [ ] Legacy command migration is documented for `my-discord-bot`.

issues.title: [IMPLEMENTATION] Add validated configuration, safe errors, and structured logging
match_titles: [TASK] Implement configuration, structured logging, and safe errors
issues.body:
## Outcome

Implement explicit local-service configuration and privacy-safe operational diagnostics.

## Scope

- Bind address, port, auth secrets, model/provider settings, limits, timeouts, adapter enablement, and retention.
- Stable error taxonomy and request correlation.
- Redaction and content-free default logging.

## Dependencies

- CA-AI-003
- CA-AI-004
- CA-AI-005

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Invalid configuration fails before serving traffic.
- [ ] Secrets, raw prompts/responses, health content, and personal paths are excluded from normal logs.
- [ ] Errors crossing the API are stable and stack-trace free.
- [ ] Configuration and error behavior are covered by offline tests.
